Authors and Citation

Citation

Sutton A, Bradbury N, Field R, Morris T, Nevill C, Nevill J, Owen R, Smart S, Xin Y (2026). metainsight: A 'shiny' Application for Network Meta-Analysis. R package version 7.0.0.
